phase-plan.purpose: Align on exterior-cleaning product vision, Payload + Supabase architecture, CRM/integration strategy, and near-term deliverables (landing + customer management + docs) before heavy build.
phase-plan.scope: In scope: PRD, roadmap tasks, CRM tool comparison (EngageBay vs HubSpot), integration map, workflow outlines, security framing for shared logins. Out of scope: full quoting engine, production credential vault implementation (plan only unless scoped).

task.description: Keep REQUIREMENTS.xml PRD the single source for vision; link out to workflows/*.md.

questions.question: Primary CRM/marketing hub: EngageBay, HubSpot, or hybrid + Payload as shell?
Where do shared passwords/API keys live long-term (1Password team, Supabase Vault, Payload encrypted fields, other)?
Calendar booking: embed (Cal.com, Calendly) vs native scheduling in Payload?
